text:
WHO IS USING THE PIK?
WE LEARNED THAT FROM STARTUPS TO CORPORATES TO EDUCATORS - THE PIK SERVES A WIDE VARIETY OF USERS
ENTREPRENEURS & STARTUPS
Structure your teams platform
thinking and enable everyone to
contribute. Accelerate your startup
and scale existing ones.
INCUBATORS & ACCELERATORS
Improve the success of your projects
by applying an effective methodology.
Get visibility of the life stages and
achieve better results of your program
INCUMBENT COMPANIES
Find new growth opportunities for
your own company and define
effective platform strategies by an
easy to apply and effective
methodology.
INVESTORS
Facilitate growth related discussions
within portfolio companies or to
accelerate and optimize the due
diligence process for better
investment decisions.
INTRAPRENEURS & CORPORATE
STARTUPS
Accelerate innovation projects,
validate new business ideas and
achieve buy-in from decision makers
across departments.
STUDENTS & EDUCATORS
We saw students using the toolkit to
turn their study assignments into real
startups and educators who used the
toolkit in their curriculums to help
students practice the theory.
• PLATFORM
N YOUS TION KIT
